input: Compare Vercel AI SDK vs Mastra for TypeScript agent development in under 250 words with sources.
inputPreview: Compare Vercel AI SDK vs Mastra for TypeScript agent development in under 250 words with sources.
output:
## Vercel AI SDK vs. Mastra: TypeScript Agent Development

### Key Findings

| | **Vercel AI SDK** | **Mastra** |
|---|---|---|
| **Origin** | Vercel (Next.js team) | Gatsby team, $13M seed (YC-backed) |
| **Focus** | UI-first, full-stack web apps | Backend-first, autonomous agents |
| **Workflows** | Via Temporal integration | Built-in orchestration engine |
| **Memory** | Session-level | Short- & long-term (cross-session) |
| **Providers** | 20+ LLM providers | 40+ LLM providers |
| **Downloads** | 20M+/month | Growing, used by PayPal, Adobe |

### Analysis

**Vercel AI SDK (v6)** is the dominant choice for **web-centric TypeScript apps**. Its `Agent` abstraction integrates natively with Next.js/React, delivers end-to-end type safety, and features built-in DevTools and human-in-the-loop tool approval. Durable execution comes via a Temporal integration rather than being native. Best for teams already in the Vercel ecosystem.

**Mastra** is purpose-built for **autonomous, long-running agents**. It ships with native workflow orchestration, RAG pipelines, vector DB management, and cross-session memory out of the box — no third-party glue required. It's gaining real production traction (Adobe, Docker, Elastic) and is updated aggressively.

### Bottom Line
- **Choose Vercel AI SDK** for Next.js apps, streaming UIs, and quick LLM integrations.
- **Choose Mastra** for complex, stateful, multi-step agents where memory and workflow orchestration are first-class needs.

---

### Sources
- [Vercel AI SDK Docs](https://ai-sdk.dev/docs/introduction)
- [AI SDK 6 Announcement – Vercel](https://vercel.com/blog/ai-sdk-6)
- [Building AI Agents with Vercel AI SDK – Vercel KB](https://vercel.com/kb/guide/how-to-build-ai-agents-with-vercel-and-the-ai-sdk)
- [Temporal + Vercel AI SDK](https://temporal.io/blog/building-durable-agents-with-temporal-and-ai-sdk-by-vercel)
- [Mastra Homepage](https://mastra.ai/)
- [Mastra GitHub](https://github.com/mastra-ai/mastra)
- [Mastra $13M Seed Round](https://technews180.com/funding-news/mastra-raises-13m-seed-for-typescript-ai-framework/)
- [Top 5 TypeScript AI Agent Frameworks 2026 – Medium](https://techwithibrahim.medium.com/top-5-typescript-ai-agent-frameworks-you-should-know-in-2026-5a2a0710f4a0)
